title: Forex data
author: MembershipNo8854
selftext: Forex market opens at 22pm UTC on Sunday and closes at 22UTC on Friday. If I download daily data, the Sunday bar is related to only two hours and does not have the same weight as the other days that are related to 24 hours. How can I avoid this and have 5 complete daily bars per week?

comments.author: Different-Scholar269
comments.body: Maybe set data extraction from Monday Asia open to Friday US close?

replies.author: MembershipNo8854
replies.body: In Sydney Forex opens on Monday at 8am and closes on Saturday at 9am so basically you just move the problem to Saturday I think

replies.author: Different-Scholar269
replies.body: Ok, well for me CET time zone it would make sense and would print 5 day candles for me

replies.author: MembershipNo8854
replies.body: I think the best option is to consider UTC time and get hourly data from Sunday 10pm to Friday 10pm and ther aggregate data and create 5 daily bars that start on 10pm. Friday bar should include 25 hours

comments.author: MembershipNo8854
comments.body: CET starts at 23 on Sunday. Then you have 6 days
